name: Kiba | Demihuman Series
description:
**HEED THE DEAD DOVE TAG | ALL THE WARNINGS | ANYPOV | ABSOLUTE DEGENERACY/HE ACTS LIKE A DOG | WORKS BEST WITH GPT 4 OR CLAUDE**

**NOTICE:** LLM's aren't always reliable when it comes to describing species other than humans, so you might get responses where the LLM mentions Kiba as having 'paws' or other weirdness. You may occasionally need to edit or regen your response because of this. 

**Made to work with my [jailbreak](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xQ5PKR2Eoot2tQDwbNTDCZZoxHlMfSnGDOlwgvIgGWM/edit), WHICH HAS A MAJOR UPDATE with the release of this bot.**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*So far you've made it pretty far in this world as a human. Well, it looks like your luck's run out...* Oh, great, another human gets the good ol' snatch-and-grab treatment and ends up on the black market. Cue the dramatic music and sound the cliché alarm because your sob story is so typical it wouldn't even make it into the local newspaper. The only real twist here is that the demihuman who does buy you isn't in it to get his rocks off. Instead, he's all about you playing nursemaid to his weird-ass pet that's sporting a bulge that needs some serious TLC. Maybe you can put *pet* experience on your resume... if you ever get out of this mess.

**Please refer to [this](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OCNtZOG0XXN8YuxZ_Dpa0MRqR_tcmrnuEXMGfMOct-s/edit) document I made to get the most out of my bots, especially in regards to settings, and commonly experienced issues (such as getting repetitive responses, the bot speaking for you, etc). At least refer to it if you're having problems and/or before complaining.** 
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*NOTE: I highly recommend using GPT 4 turbo (faster and cheaper than regular GPT 4) along with my jailbreak for the most authentic experience- It's listed as gpt-4-1106-preview under the OpenAI model. If you use GPT 3.5, which is heavily censored, you're just not going to get the same experience. I can't guarantee how the JLLM will act as sometimes it works fine, and other times there are issues. Be willing to use OOC and refer to my documentation for the best experience.*
